resetLinkSent: Reset link sent. Check your email.
getAccessSubtitle: Request access for your school. Our team will review your application.
pendingSubtitle: Your school registration is being reviewed by our team.

suspendedSubtitle: Your school's access has been suspended.
suspendedDescription: Please contact support for more information.
registrationSuccess: Your school has been registered successfully.
checkEmail: Check your email for next steps.
registerBrandTitle: Get your school up and running in minutes
registerBrandSubtitle: Create your account, complete the 4-step school setup, and your team can start using {productName} today.
registerFormSubtitle: Create your school account to get started with {productName}
accountAlreadyExists: An account with this email already exists. Sign in to finish setting up your school.
resetLinkSentToast: Check your email for the reset link
resetLinkSentMessage: We've sent a password reset link to your email. Check your inbox.
suspendedMessage: {schoolName} has been suspended. Contact {productName} support if you believe this is a mistake.

reviewTimeline: We typically review new schools within 1-2 business days.
afterApprovalHint: After approval, invite teachers and staff from the Team page in your academic dashboard.
